_comment: USD price per 1,000,000 tokens. cacheWrite5m = 1.25x input; cacheWrite1h = 2x input; cacheRead = 0.1x input (standard Anthropic prompt-caching multipliers). The ledger stores RAW token counts; authoritative USD is computed at REPORT time from this table after a freshness check (see capturedAt/ttlHours below and references/cost-telemetry.md). Unknown models fall back by id-prefix, then to _default.

refresh._comment: When (now - capturedAt) > ttlHours the prices are STALE: the analytics skill must fetch a fresh table BEFORE pricing, then rewrite `models`, `capturedAt` (to now), and keep `ttlHours`. ttlHours is the parameterizable lifecycle (default 48h); the human may override it per run.
sources: claude-api skill (canonical, bundled — Current Models pricing table)
GET /v1/models (capabilities; pricing on the pricing page)
refresh.onUnavailable: proceed with the stale table and flag staleness loudly in the report (capturedAt + age); never block the run
